summary:
There is no established clinical guideline recommending either anterior or posterior seating when placing a final impression tray; all available evidence focuses on tray fit, minimizing tissue trauma, and avoiding tears rather than sequence of insertion. The choice between directions appears arbitrary and depends solely on clinician preference due to lack of supportive documentation.  

Final Answer: \boxed{C}
